title: vatica venulosa subsp. simalurensis
intro: Vatica venulosa subsp. simalurensis is a plant species within the family Dipterocarpaceae, commonly referred to as a tree. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
